name: team-project-memory
description: Additive team-shared project memory for AI agents

interface.shortDescription: Shared team learnings for agent workflows
interface.longDescription: Additive, git-backed team memory that captures validated learnings, failed attempts, confidence, and next-reuse instructions without overriding repo-local instructions.
defaultPrompt: Use Team Project Memory to capture validated team learnings.
Reuse prior debugging paths without overwriting repo instructions.
